description: Large model inference, Llama-3-70B-Instruct. Chip count is flexible — use however many chips your hardware needs. Leaderboard groups results by chip count.
_required_chips_note: Suite B needs the full GPU count to fit the 70B model. Set to 'auto' so runners use all available GPUs when no --tensor-parallel-size flag or yaml config is set.
_request_count_note: offline uses request_count (100), online uses online_request_count (200; reduced from 500 — 70B low-QPS levels are rate-bound, p95 is preserved, p99 is marginal at 200 reqs), interactive uses interactive_request_count (50; 70B decodes at ~33 tok/s on A800, making each request ~15s sequential — 500 reqs × 3 runs ≈ 390 min; p90 is the reported tail metric for Suite B interactive)
